channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: A quarter-century after his lone national title, Tom Izzo comes up short again in March Madness
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Izzo pounded the scorers' table in frustration. He cusped his hands behind his head, struggling to figure out some way for his Michigan State team to make a few baskets in the NCAA Tournament's South Region final.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 5 players, 2 coaches ejected after Pistons-Timberwolves skirmish in 2nd quarter
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Five players and two coaches were ejected after a fight broke out in the second quarter in the Minnesota Timberwolves' game against the Detroit Pistons on Sunday. Detroit lost head coach J.B. Bickerstaff, center Isaiah Stewart, forward Ron Holland II and guard Marcus Sasser.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK DONNELLY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 5 players, 2 coaches ejected as Detroit Pistons get into on-court brawl
item.description: Five players and two coaches were ejected Sunday after the Detroit Pistons got into an on-court brawl with the Timberwolves in the middle of the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Diamondbacks rally for 8 runs in the eighth to beat the Cubs 10-6, split 4-game series
item.description: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. hit a game-tying, two-run homer, Josh Naylor had the go-ahead RBI double and the Arizona Diamondbacks used an eight-run eighth inning to rally past the Chicago Cubs 10-6 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Min Woo Lee holds off Scheffler and Woodland to win Houston Open for first PGA Tour title
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Min Woo Lee kept his calm amid tremendous charges by Scottie Scheffler and Gary Woodland, winning the Houston Open on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title with the best lag of his life that set up a final par for a one-shot victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston's defense carries Cougars into 7th Final Four with 69-50 March Madness win over Tennessee
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Houston’s relentless, harassing defense had Tennessee's shooters dancing around. Now, the Cougars are two-stepping it back to Texas. L.J.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rafael Devers fans twice more to give him an MLB-record 12 in Red Sox's first 4 games
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Boston Red Sox designated hitter Rafael Devers became the first major leaguer to strike out 12 times in a season’s first four games. Devers went 0 for 4 with two more strikeouts Sunday in Boston’s 3-2 loss to the Texas Rangers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Denny Hamlin ends 10-year win drought at Martinsville Speedway
item.description: Denny Hamlin ended an agonizing 10-year winless streak at Martinsville Speedway, holding off teammate Christopher Bell in his home state to secure a spot in the NASCAR Cup Series playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kern County residents notch top times in 2025 Bakersfield Marathon
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- No amount of rain dampened the spirit of participants of the 2025 Bakersfield Marathon. The eighth edition of the race was delayed Sunday because of rain but when the starting gun went off, the big race was on.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lauren Betts and UCLA reach first Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament, beating LSU 72-65
item.description: Lauren Betts had 17 points and seven rebounds despite spending the entire second quarter on the bench, and top overall seed UCLA reached its first Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament with a 72-65 victory over LSU.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: Chloe Kitts scored 14 points and defending national champion South Carolina reached the Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament for a fifth straight year, beating Duke 54-50 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Mexico taps UC San Diego's Eric Olen to replace Richard Pitino
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — New Mexico hired UC San Diego's Eric Olen on Sunday as its next basketball coach. Olen will replace Richard Pitino, who left to become Xavier's coach on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RSL gets shut out again at Minnesota United, 2-0
item.description: ST. PAUL (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, and third overall this MLS season, Real Salt Lake failed to score a goal in a 2-0 shutout at Minnesota United Saturday night. Tani Oluwaseyi recorded a brace to help Minnesota United hand Real Salt Lake its fourth loss of the season. Dayne St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Man City rallies to beat Bournemouth and reach FA Cup semifinals but Haaland goes off injured
item.description: Manchester City could still end its disappointing season with a trophy after rallying to beat Bournemouth 2-1 in the FA Cup quarterfinals on Sunday, with Erling Haaland inspiring the comeback before being forced off injured.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kelly Clarkson takes subtle shot at Cowboys owner Jerry Jones
item.description: Pop star Kelly Clarkson threw some subtle shade at Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on Kylie Kelce's podcast earlier in the week. But she still is optimistic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Roki Sasaki pulled from Dodger Stadium debut in 2nd inning after more struggles with his control
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Roki Sasaki's career with the Los Angeles Dodgers is not off to a sensational start. For a young pitcher who's been a dominant force at every other step in his meteoric baseball career, that's both a surprise and a challenge.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kyle Tucker homers as the Cubs hold off the Diamondbacks for a 4-3 win
item.description: Kyle Tucker hit his first home run with the Chicago Cubs, leading his new team to a 4-3 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ilia Malinin cruises to 2nd straight title to cap an American gold rush at figure skating worlds
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ilia Malinin walked toward the ice for his free skate at the world championships with the swagger of a conquering hero. Then he backed up the bravado.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Moncada and Soriano deliver as the Angels edge the White Sox 1-0
item.description: Yoán Moncada hit an RBI single against his former team in the eighth inning, and the Los Angeles Angels blanked the Chicago White Sox 1-0 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NBA great Shaquille O'Neal's son Shaqir leaving Florida A&M and transferring again: report
item.description: Shaqir O'Neal will enter the transfer portal, On3 reported. The junior forward started 17 games for Florida A&M last season after two years at Texas Southern.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani ramps up throwing program, but Roberts says MVP isn't close to mound debut for Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani threw his first bullpen session in a month on Saturday, but the reigning NL MVP still has plenty of work to do before he takes the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hailey Van Lith scores 26 points to lead TCU to 1st Elite Eight with 71-62 win over Notre Dame
item.description: TCU is in unchartered territory thanks to Hailey Van Lith, reaching the Elite Eight for the first time.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CMU men's lacrosse escapes Concorida as Maverick women dominate CSU Pueblo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa's Men's Lacrosse team looked in full control on their way to a sixth win when they held a 7-3 second-half lead over RMAC foe Concordia University Irvine. Then came a Golden Eagle onslaught. Three quick goals and CUI was within one.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Opening Day 2025: White Sox have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Jerrod Calhoun signs new contract with USU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in three years, Utah State will not have to search for a new head basketball coach.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How the San Diego Padres got their name
item.description: The San Diego Padres' name is a tribute to the city's history, with the team's name coming from the Franciscan Friars who founded the area.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Utah's playoff hopes take big hit with 5-1 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The playoff hopes of the Utah Hockey Club are growing dimmer after a 5-1 loss to the Detroit Red Wings Monday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stephen Curry listed as questionable for Golden State's Tuesday game in Miami
item.description: Stephen Curry is back with the Golden State Warriors after missing the first game of the team's road trip with a pelvic contusion, and could play when his team takes on the Miami Heat in Jimmy Butler's return game Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Donato, Connor Bedard lead Blackhawks over Flyers 7-4
item.description: Ryan Donato scored twice, Connor Bedard had a goal and an assist, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Philadelphia Flyers 7-4 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
